fields.label: Background Image
fields.name: background_image
fields.instructions: Optional dark background image. Falls back to solid black with gradient overlay.

fields.label: Large Image
fields.name: image_large
fields.instructions: Primary image (left side). Recommended: 784×416 or similar landscape ratio.

fields.label: Small Image
fields.name: image_small
fields.instructions: Secondary image (right side). Recommended: ~385×414 or similar portrait/square ratio.
